posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 11 of 11 Pending | Tied for 1st with 38 others Guaylupo vs. MilerPiero Guaylupo, TKO, R1Piero hasn’t beaten anyone good but he’s been handling these guys like he should be. Being the main event on fight pass, I imagine dwcs is next with a good performancePerea vs. MadeiraMayton Perea, TKO, R1Madeira looks good on paper but he has no idea how to use his reach and is super hittable. He barely beat that can in LFA as a massive fav and quit to a leg kick instantly against Chaaban
